tools.name: generate_evidence
tools.description: Full workflow: authenticate with Okta, SHA-256 hash the file, register the evidence, upload to S3, and poll until COMPLETED or ERROR.

tools.name: get_evidence
tools.description: Retrieve full evidence details by ID (status, timestamps, custody, metadata).

tools.name: create_signature_request
tools.description: Create a new signature request in DRAFT state. Supports fullFlow=true to complete the entire flow with preconfigured participants in a single call.

tools.name: add_document_to_signature_request
tools.description: Add a document to a DRAFT signature request and upload the file to S3.

tools.name: add_signatory_to_document
tools.description: Add a signatory to a document within a signature request.

tools.name: add_validator_to_signatory
tools.description: Add a validator to a signatory; the validator must approve before the signatory can sign.

tools.name: add_observer_to_document
tools.description: Add an observer to a document; observers receive notifications but do not sign.

tools.name: activate_signature_request
tools.description: Activate a signature request (DRAFT → ACTIVE), triggering notifications to signatories.

tools.name: get_signature_request
tools.description: Retrieve full details of a signature request by ID (status, documents, participants, history).
